mapper.select: SELECT cno,cname,sex,email,dname,phone,TO_CHAR(regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regdate,TO_CHAR(birth_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS birth_date,grade,status FROM customer c JOIN grade g ON c.gno=g.gno ORDER BY cno OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT cno,cname,sex,phone,email,TO_CHAR(birth_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS birth_date,TO_CHAR(regdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS regdate,addr1,addr2,grade,status,id,pwd FROM customer c JOIN grade g ON c.gno=g.gno WHERE id=#{id}
